message:
feat(sandbox): enforce WASM guest memory limits via wasmtime ResourceLimiter

Implements wasmtime's ResourceLimiter trait for WasiHostState to bound
guest module memory growth to config.memory_limit_bytes. This prevents
malicious or buggy WASM modules from consuming unbounded host memory.

- Adds memory_limit_bytes field to WasiHostState, populated from config
- memory_growing() rejects requests where desired > memory_limit_bytes
- table_growing() is unrestricted (tables are bounded by other means)
- Limiter wired into Store via store.limiter() at construction time

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
